purpose: Validate source-bound authenticated OpenRegion progress, consumer-derived command digests, post-filter adjusted-command binding, and bounded recovery ledger behavior without simulator, policy, socket, action, or dispatch.
coverage: canonical seven-scalar command digest and non-finite rejection
exact OpenRegion joint source, before/after augmented state, progress claim, and attestation binding
wrong joint source rejected before progress attestation issuance
post-filter adjusted command receives fresh membership and authorization while dispatch remains zero
cross-state, unknown, or stale filter witness hard-blocks before authorization
replan does not refund cumulative budgets and untrusted progress hard-blocks
claim_boundary: Passing establishes only deterministic unit/fake-observation wiring into the existing CTDA v2 reference checker with a simulator-test exact-allowlist issuer. It does not establish raw sensor authenticity, production signatures, physical filter correctness, a recovery controller, a positive simulator transition, task utility, or rollout safety.
next_gate: Bind a real no-action filter producer and signed/authenticated verifier, freeze disjoint numeric progress/recovery budgets, then run a simulator-initialization-only positive/threshold observation probe before any clean pilot.
